metadata.title: Find Orphaned Images
metadata.description: Finds images in the vault that are not linked to any notes. Either lists, or deletes them.

regex.source: Notice(`Found ${a.length} orphaned images. Note created or updated with details.`)
regex.target: Notice(`发现 ${a.length} 个孤立图像，已创建注释或更新了详细信息。`)

regex.source: Notice("Failed to delete the orphaned image.")
Notice("No orphaned images found to delete.")
regex.target: Notice("未找到要删除的孤立图像。")

regex.source: Notice(`Note "${g}" created or updated with orphaned images.`)
regex.target: Notice(`请注意，"${g}" 是使用孤立图像创建或更新的。`)

regex.source: Notice("Failed to create or update note with orphaned images.")
regex.target: Notice("无法创建或更新带有孤立图像的注释。")
.log("正在加载“查找孤立图像”插件")

regex.source: text:"Create a Report or Delete the Images?"
regex.target: text:"创建报告还是删除图像？"

regex.source: .setDesc("Create a report with embedded images. This will display the images in the note.")
regex.target: .setDesc("创建带有嵌入图像的报告，这将在注释中显示图像。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Create a report with text links to the images. This will not display the images in the note.")
regex.target: .setDesc("创建包含图片文本链接的报告，这不会在笔记中显示图片。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Delete the X images found in the vault. X is the max delete count, defined in the settings.")
regex.target: .setDesc("删除保管库中找到的 X 个图像，X 是设置中定义的最大删除数量。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Comma-separated list of image extensions to look for.")
regex.target: .setDesc("要查找的图像扩展名的逗号分隔列表。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Maximum number of orphaned images to delete (-1 for no limit).")
regex.target: .setDesc("要删除的孤立图像的最大数量（-1 表示无限制）。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Enable or disable the sidebar button to find orphaned images.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用或禁用侧边栏按钮来查找孤立图像。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, orphaned images will be moved to the system trash instead of deleted.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，孤立的图像将被移至系统垃圾箱而不是被删除。")
